name: Bruno Fernandes

current_form.value: Manchester United captain and standout performer in 2025-26: set a new United record for most assists in a single Premier League season (16th, passing Beckham's 15) on 15 March 2026; named FWA Footballer of the Year on 8 May 2026 off 8 goals and 19 assists in the league.

fitness.value: Fit; no reported injury concerns ahead of the tournament. Named in Portugal's 26-man squad.

wc_role.value: Portugal vice-captain, named in Roberto Martínez's 26-man World Cup 2026 squad (squad reported 19 May 2026). Scored a hat-trick in a 9-1 win over Armenia on 16 Nov 2025 that secured Portugal's qualification. Portugal in Group K with DR Congo, Uzbekistan and Colombia.

records.value: Most assists in a single Premier League season for Manchester United (16+, passing David Beckham's 15 from 1999-2000).

image_todo: fetch + verify a Creative-Commons portrait; no fabricated URLs
